top3.sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Id = (
    SELECT ParentId
    FROM posts
    WHERE ParentId IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY Score DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Id = (
    SELECT ParentId
    FROM posts
    WHERE ParentId IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY Score DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT p2.OwnerDisplayName
FROM posts p1
JOIN posts p2 ON p1.ParentId = p2.Id
WHERE p1.ParentId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p1.Score DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Id = (
    SELECT ParentId
    FROM posts
    WHERE ParentId IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY Score DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Id = (
    SELECT ParentId
    FROM posts
    WHERE ParentId IS NOT NULL AND Score = (
        SELECT MAX(Score)
        FROM posts
        WHERE ParentId IS NOT NULL
    )
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT p2.OwnerDisplayName
FROM posts p1
JOIN posts p2 ON p1.ParentId = p2.Id
WHERE p1.ParentId IS NOT NULL AND p1.Score = (
    SELECT MAX(Score)
    FROM posts
    WHERE ParentId IS NOT NULL
)
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Id = (
    SELECT ParentId
    FROM posts
    WHERE ParentId IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY Score DESC
    LIMIT 1
);
